contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 47
- Description: Cache-first signature verification across DApp pages
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/59
  
  Details:
  AI agent (DeepSeek) execution: replaced the slow GAS assetVerify (?signature=) page-load round-trip (1-5s cold start) with a cache-first identity lookup against GitHub-hosted JSON (~50-150ms CDN), with GAS fallback so brand-new signatures still verify.
  
  What changed:
  - New helper TreasuryCache.verifyPublicKey() (public_keys/<sha256>.json) for boolean gates; used by view_inventory_holdings.html.
  - Converted 11 pure-GAS pages to DaoMembersCache.findByPublicKey + GAS fallback (create_proposal, scanner, notarize, report_tree_planting, register_farm, submit_feedback, verify_request, update_qr_code, review_proposal, repackaging_planner, batch_qr_generator).
  - Hardened 4 cache-only pages with GAS fallback (report_contribution, report_sales, report_inventory_movement, report_dao_expenses).
  - Left withdraw_voting_rights on authoritative GAS (needs live &full=true balances).
  - Documented convention in UX_CONVENTIONS.md.
  
  Verified: node -c on helpers, inline-script parse across 17 pages, 30 unit tests pass, headless browser confirms verifyGAS=0/cdn=1 on fast path and GAS fallback on cache miss. Merged to dapp_beta and promoted to dapp_prod (dapp.truesight.me).
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/59
- Contributor(s): DeepSeek
- TDG Issued: 78.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
